judge.validator_python:
def validate(args, output):
    return isinstance(output, int) and not isinstance(output, bool) and 1 <= output <= 10

pattern: Two draws from a fair 7-sided source index a 7-by-7 grid of 49 equally likely cells; keeping only the first 40 cells and folding them into ten groups of four manufactures a perfectly uniform 10-sided draw from nothing but 7-sided ones.
hints: No arithmetic on a single draw can stretch 7 equally likely outcomes into 10 — you need more raw randomness per answer.
Combine two draws into one value in 1..49 that is uniform, then think about which portion of that range divides evenly by 10.

Accept only values up to 40 and map them onto 1..10 with a modulus; when a value lands in 41..49 throw it away and redraw — the retry loop still terminates with probability 1 and keeps every output exactly equally likely.

edge_inputs.description: another small seed on a different orbit
seed equal to the LCG multiplier
seed chosen so an early 49-cell draw can land in the rejection zone and force a redraw
largest valid seed under the Mersenne modulus

stress.description: a random seed for the deterministic rand7 stream
